summary: Frontend text contrast testing for LIGHT minimalist mode. Found CRITICAL text visibility issues across multiple screens. The CSS overrides in theme-minimalist.css only target pastel colors 200-400 range but miss 50/100 (very light) and 500+ (medium). Many screens use emerald-50, emerald-100, emerald-200/70 which are INVISIBLE on light backgrounds.

issues: Line 214: 'Valorización de Inventario' header uses text-emerald-50 - INVISIBLE on light bg
Line 215: 'Análisis financiero del stock actual' uses text-emerald-200/70 - INVISIBLE
Line 243: 'Valor Total del Inventario' uses text-emerald-300/80 - VERY FAINT
Line 244: RD$ value uses text-emerald-100 - INVISIBLE
Line 247: '7 registros 7 ingredientes' uses text-emerald-200/60 - INVISIBLE
Line 263: 'Aumento vs periodo anterior' uses opacity-70 - FAINT
Line 77: 'Modo de Tema' label uses default foreground - OK
Line 155: 'Personalizar Neumorfismo' label - appears faint in screenshot
Line 198: 'Fondo Claro' label inherits foreground color but appears invisible - CSS not applying
Line 200: 'Color de Brillo (Glow)' label - INVISIBLE on light bg
Filter buttons (Todos, Admin, Mesero, Cajero, Cocina) use colored text on 10% opacity bg which creates low contrast in light mode
Role badges after user names are very faint - text-green-500 on bg-green-500/20 has poor contrast on light bg
Stat card subtitles like '27 facturas | Promedio: RD$ 1,126.67' use text-muted-foreground which is light gray
Various secondary labels like 'Descuentos (3)', 'Ordenes Activas', 'Turnos Abiertos' are faint but readable
Category tabs like 'CERVEZAS' use green-colored text that may be faint
'Enviado' badges use cyan/teal coloring that could be improved

action_items: CRITICAL: Update theme-minimalist.css to include emerald-0/1/5 (emerald-50, emerald-100, emerald-500) color overrides
CRITICAL: Add CSS overrides for ALL pastel color variants (50, 100, 200/opacity) not just 200-400 range
HIGH: Consider inline style overrides for hardcoded emerald colors in ValuationTab.jsx (lines 214, 215, 243, 244, 247)
HIGH: Review Settings > Appearance ThemeTab.js labels - may need explicit text color classes
MEDIUM: Review filter button contrast in UsersTab.js - consider darker text variants for light mode
critical_code_review_comments: theme-minimalist.css line 366-371: Targets text-green-2/3/4 but NOT text-emerald-0/1 (50/100 variants)
ValuationTab.jsx extensively uses emerald-50/100/200/300 which are too light for light backgrounds
CSS attribute selectors [class*="text-emerald-2"] don't match text-emerald-50 or text-emerald-100
The foreground CSS variable is correctly set but some elements use hardcoded pastel colors

success_rate.frontend: 40% - Multiple CRITICAL text contrast issues found

context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme is currently in Minimalista Light mode. Need to fix CSS overrides for emerald-50/100 variants and other very-light pastel colors. The main issue is that theme-minimalist.css only overrides colors in 200-400 range, missing the 50/100 (very pastel) and 500+ (medium) colors used extensively in inventory valuation and settings pages.

css_override_gap.missing_coverage: text-green-50, text-green-100, text-green-500, text-green-600 and all emerald equivalents

screens_tested.dashboard: PASS with minor issues - some secondary labels are faint
screens_tested.order_screen: PASS with minor issues - category tabs and badges could be improved
screens_tested.payment_screen: PASS - major text elements are visible
screens_tested.settings_users: FAIL - filter buttons and badges have low contrast
